name: PhysicsAirplane3D
shortDescription: Simulate an airplane using the 3D physics.
description: Simulate an airplane with simple physics. The airplane can go in any direction and spin back to level with the horizon when players release direction keys.

eventsFunctions.description: Turn the object around its local X axis.
eventsFunctions.name: TurnX
eventsFunctions.sentence: Turn _PARAM1_ of _PARAM3_° around its local X axis

eventsFunctions.description: Turn the object around its local Y axis.
eventsFunctions.name: TurnY
eventsFunctions.sentence: Turn _PARAM1_ of _PARAM3_° around its local Y axis

eventsFunctions.description: Turn the object around its local Z axis.
eventsFunctions.name: TurnZ
eventsFunctions.sentence: Turn _PARAM1_ of _PARAM3_° around its local Z axis

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Simulate an airplane using the 3D physics.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: PhysicsAirplane3D

parameters: clamp(CurrentForwardSpeed + AcceleratorInput * ForwardAcceleration * TimeDelta, ForwardSpeedMin, ForwardSpeedMax)

events.comment: The splin animation is reverted for the movement calculus because it affects how the plane turn around its local Y and Z axis.

events.name: Spin the wings to match rotation

parameters: TargetedSpin + AngleDifference(CurrentSpin, TargetedSpin) * exp(TimeDelta() * SpinLogSpeed) - CurrentSpin
